prompt: Return only Rust code. Define a public tuple struct XriqAmount(u64) with pub fn new(value: u64) -> Self, pub fn as_u64(&self) -> u64, and pub fn checked_add(self, other: Self) -> Option<Self> using checked_add.

Return only Rust code. Define a public Transaction struct with public fields from: String, to: String, amount: u64, nonce: u64. Also define pub fn validate_transaction(tx: &Transaction) -> Result<(), String> that rejects empty or whitespace from/to values and rejects amount 0.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn calculate_fee(byte_len: usize, fee_per_byte: u64) -> Option<u64> that converts byte_len to u64 and uses checked multiplication to avoid overflow.

Return only Rust code. Include the necessary use std::collections::HashSet import. Define pub fn insert_tx(mempool: &mut HashSet<String>, tx_id: String) -> bool that returns true only when tx_id was not already present.

Return only Rust code. Define a public BlockHeader struct with public fields height: u64, previous_hash: [u8; 32], timestamp_ms: u64. Also define pub fn next_height(parent: &BlockHeader) -> Option<u64> using checked_add.
Return only Rust code. Define pub fn parse_amount(input: &str) -> Result<u64, String> that trims whitespace, rejects empty input, and parses a non-negative integer amount.

Return only Rust code. Include use std::collections::HashMap. Define a public Account struct with public balance: u64 and nonce: u64 fields. Define a public Transaction struct with public from: String, to: String, amount: u64, fee: u64, and nonce: u64 fields. Define a public LedgerError enum. Define pub fn apply_transaction(accounts: &mut HashMap<String, Account>, fee_sink: &mut u64, tx: &Transaction) -> Result<(), LedgerError>. The function must reject a missing sender, bad nonce, insufficient funds, and arithmetic overflow. It must debit amount plus fee from the sender using checked arithmetic, increment the sender nonce, create the recipient account if missing, credit amount to the recipient, and add fee to fee_sink.
